content.speakerText: Hi Sarah, hope you're doing well!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，莎拉，希望你最近不错！

options.text: I'm good, thanks! I've got a few questions about expense reimbursement.
I'm fine, but I need to talk to the HR manager.
Not bad. Can you send me the payroll report?

content.explanation: 正确答案直接回应了问候并自然过渡到报销咨询，符合场景目的。选项2转向HR，偏离主题；选项3建议吃午饭，不专业；选项4问工资单，与报销无关。

content.speakerText: Good morning, Mr. Thompson. How are you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，汤普森先生，今天怎么样？

options.text: I'm great, thanks! I'm preparing my expense reports for this quarter.
I'm okay. Do you have time for a meeting later?
Fine, but I'm busy with taxes.
Not too bad. Did you see the new office layout?

content.explanation: 正确答案礼貌回应问候并自然引出报销主题。选项2虽礼貌但未提及报销，偏离场景目标；选项3语气消极且未明确意图；选项4转向办公室布局，无关话题。

options.text: Pretty good! Could you help me with submitting my travel expenses?
Not bad. I need to update my contact info.
Awesome! Let’s grab coffee after work.
Doing well. When’s the next team meeting?

content.explanation: 正确答案使用轻松语气并明确报销需求，符合职场非正式问候场景。选项2涉及个人信息更新，无关；选项3建议喝咖啡，属于社交回应；选项4询问会议，偏离报销主题。

content.template: I'm good, thanks! I've got a few questions about ___ reimbursement.
content.hint: 与报销相关的核心名词

content.template: Could you please help me ___ my trip expenses?
content.hint: 表达‘帮助某人做某事’的固定搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（help sb with sth）

content.template: I need to ___ my receipts before the deadline.
content.hint: 报销流程中的关键动作

content.speakerText: Hi Sarah, hope you're doing well!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，莎拉，希望你最近不错！
expectedAnswers: I'm good, thanks! I've got a few questions about expense reimbursement.
Doing great! Could you help me with my trip expenses?
Not bad—just wanted to check in about submitting my receipts this week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确提出报销咨询
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合职场轻松但专业的语气

content.speakerText: Good morning, Mr. Chen. How are you today?
content.speakerTextCn: 早上好，陈先生，今天怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I'm well, thank you. I’m preparing my quarterly expense reports and have a couple of questions.
Pretty good! I need to get my travel claims processed before Friday.
Fine, thanks. Could you advise on the policy for meal reimbursements?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然引入报销主题
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词和名词搭配
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合职场语境，避免过于随意或生硬

content.speakerTextCn: 嘿，亚历克斯，最近怎么样？
expectedAnswers: Not bad! I’ve got some receipts to submit for my client trip last month.
Pretty good—could you point me to the right form for expense claims?
Doing okay. I’m a bit confused about the deadline for submitting travel expenses.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达报销需求
语言准确性：使用了正确的动词和名词（submit, receipts, expense claims）
表达自然度：语气轻松但专业，符合同事间非正式但工作相关的对话
